name: Chicken Salad Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the Mandarin orange segments.
2. In a large bowl, combine mayonnaise or salad dressing, lime juice, salt, and nutmeg.
3. Add the remaining ingredients: cubed chicken, drained mandarin oranges, grape halves, chopped celery, and slivered toasted almonds.
4. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
5. Chill the mixture in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
6. Serve on lettuce leaves.
7. Refrigerate any leftovers in a sealed container.
